texto: Now, through an act as simple as walking across a stage and collecting an empty plastic folder representing a degree, our stock had plummeted to nothing, the wretched leavings of some cosmic Ponzi scheme. A lifetime's worth of planning and training and delusion gone with the wind. Some of us were moving home to live free of charge in our parents' guest rooms, or if we were thin enough, heading west to try our luck in L.A.; others, to our collective horror, were being forced to work at actual jobs.
explicacao: Citação de Rachel Shukert sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Now, through an act as simple as walking across a stage and collecting an empty plastic folder re…” articula reflexao, memoir, through em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
